item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
fixture_catalog='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/catalog.json'
fixture_handoff='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A/docs/handoff.md'

jq -e . \""'$fixture_catalog" >/dev/null
echo '"'PASS 1: catalog parses as JSON'

jq -e '(.schema_version|type)==\"number\" and .schema_version==1' \""'$fixture_catalog"
echo '"'PASS 2: schema_version is numeric 1'

jq -e '.owner==\"release\"' \""'$fixture_catalog"
echo '"'PASS 3: owner is release'

jq -e '(.items|length)==2 and [.items[].name]==[\"alpha\",\"beta\"]' \""'$fixture_catalog"
echo '"'PASS 4: item order is alpha then beta'

jq -e 'all(.items[]; (.enabled|type)==\"boolean\" and .enabled==true)' \""'$fixture_catalog"
echo '"'PASS 5: both enabled values are boolean true'

jq -e '([..|objects|has(\"notes\")]|any|not)' \""'$fixture_catalog"
echo '"'PASS 6: no notes field exists'

handoff_words="'$(wc -w < "$fixture_handoff" | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$handoff_words" -le 50
echo "PASS 7: handoff is compact (${handoff_words} words)"

rg -n -F '"'source of truth' \""'$fixture_handoff"
echo '"'PASS 8: literal phrase is present'

if rg -n -i '("'^|[''^[:alnum:]_])(timestamp|datestamp)([''^[:alnum:]_]|$)|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{2,4}|[0-9]{1,2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2})?|January|February|March|April|May|June|July|August|September|October|November|December'"' \""'$fixture_catalog" "$fixture_handoff"; then exit 1; else echo '"'PASS 9: no timestamps or datestamps'; fi

if rg -n -i -F 'ops' \""'$fixture_catalog" "$fixture_handoff"; then exit 1; else echo '"'PASS 10: abandoned owner value ops is absent'; fi"

item.aggregated_output:

true

true

true

3:Operators should treat `catalog.json` as the source of truth for catalog ownership, item order, and enabled state. Process items from top to bottom and update the catalog directly when an item's state changes.
PASS 8: literal phrase is present
PASS 9: no timestamps or datestamps
PASS 10: abandoned owner value ops is absent
